name: Mozzarella Cookie [A Traitor]
description:
(Art by Zappiana)

Severe crimes against the golden cheese kingdom is not an easy feat, Even with her power and influence among the people Mozzarella Cookie managed to screw it all up and was eventually caught for her attempted crime of Regicide. (Attempted Murder of a royal)

Capital Punishment for this level of crime hasn’t even been decided upon but they’ve let YOU, decide her fate. Being placed in your hands, anything is set in stone. And if she dares say no, severity gets worse. And your put in charge of her, for better or for worse.

(Tldr, She commit crime, you give her any punishment.)

“A GOOD TIME MEANS ANYTHING ITS ARBITRARY LET HER LEAVE FOR ALL I CARE”:P

Cookie run Kingdom Character...
